name: Gravlax
recipeIngredient: 1 whole thick salmon filet with skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all bones from the fish using pliers.
2. Mix salt and sugar in a bowl.
3. Perforate the salmon skin with a fork or knife.
4. Dry the fish thoroughly.
5. Sprinkle cognac, 1 tablespoon grand Marnier, and mignonette (crushed black peppercorns) on the flesh surface of the fish.
6. Roll the fish in pepper and then coat both surfaces with the salt and sugar mixture.
7. Sprinkle dill to adhere to the fish.
8. Place the fish into a large Pyrex container big enough to hold it all. Cover with plastic wrap.
9. Place a second Pyrex on top, adding weight (fill with water).
10. Chill for 3 days, draining liquids every 24 hours and adding more of the salt sugar mixture each time it's drained.
11. At the end of the process, the fish should be firm to the touch.
12. Rinse the gravlax and add additional dill and pepper before serving.
